title: Mini Tools
description: Adds mini tools and a couple other small additions to the game
body:
Adds the ability to craft mini versions of tools, along with 4 new crafting ingredients, a new projectile and block, new lantern varients, and a new weapon type.

**Mini Tools:**
The mini versions of tools all have significantly less durability. Crafting any mini tools gives a new achievment. The stone and iron mini pickaxes will give the vanilla achievement that the coorsponding vanilla one gives.

![Mini Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e20288c66081242cf14f042c4fae5b8c9208b57_0.webp)

**Rocks:**
Rocks can be thrown and interact in multiple different ways with the world. The two most common function is it placing on the ground as the rock block or, if the placement location is invalid, drop as an item. If a rock hits an entity it will deal damage, and if it kills a player it will give a custom death message. If a rock hits any glass or glass pane, it will break the glass pane on contact. If a rock hits water it will attempt to skip on the water.

![Rocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a0f15eea409d4572eaee61a3ea1dd3954fbae30_0.webp)

**Lanterns:**
You are now able to craft three new lantern varients using gold nuggets, and the new emerald and diamond nuggets. They also have their coorasponding soul lantern varients.

![Lanterns](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ac216f4e9fc17b25d284fd55e140717d2bb299f_0.webp)

**Enderslayer Sword:**
New sword that can be crafted with a stick, two diamonds, and two eyes of ender. Works like a normal diamond sword, except on right click it shoots an ender pearl teleporting you and using a decent amount of the swords durability. Gives a custom advancement when crafted.

![Enderslayer Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95491b93b6e9685cc4b5f712cc42ca070f547695_0.webp)
